details: gh.exe v2.91.0 present at C:\Program Files\GitHub CLI\gh.exe; `gh auth status` exit 1; %APPDATA%\GitHub CLI\hosts.yml does not exist. Agent attempted interactive `gh auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web` from persistent terminal; advanced past first prompt with 'y' but the second 'Press Enter to open https://github.com/login/device' prompt could not be advanced because send_to_terminal cannot deliver a raw Enter keypress to a non-TTY child process. Device code 53F5-11A7 was issued but unused. Agent then asked user via vscode_askQuestions to paste a PAT for $env:GH_TOKEN fallback; user was unavailable.
remediation_options: A: complete `gh auth login` in a fresh PowerShell BEFORE re-issuing the relay; verify with `gh auth status`
B: include `GH_TOKEN: ghp_...` line in the next relay prompt so agent can set $env:GH_TOKEN
C: manual PR via web UI using artifacts in TUNNELL-MATHLIB-PR-OPEN/ (CardEvenOfInvolution.lean + pr_description.md)
